title: Crear y confirmar una factura y verla pendiente de impresión en historial
description: Verifica que un vendedor pueda armar un carrito con SKU, aplicar descuentos y confirmar una factura, quedando visible en historial con estado pendiente de impresión y ticket accesible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Invoice Product into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-INV-001 into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Open the manual stock adjustment tool for the created product
Fill 10 into the stock adjustment quantity field
Fill Seed stock for invoicing into the adjustment reason field
Confirm the stock adjustment
Click the link to open the invoicing module
Click the link to start creating a new invoice
Fill ZENT-SKU-INV-001 into the SKU search field
Add the found product to the cart
Set the cart item quantity to 2
Fill a valid item-level discount into the item discount field
Fill a valid global discount into the global discount field
Fill Zentory Customer into the customer name field
Confirm the invoice to send it to printing
Click the link to open the invoice history module
Filter the invoice list by status pending for printing
Open the most recent invoice detail from the list
Verify the invoice ticket detail is displayed in read-only mode

title: Iniciar sesión y llegar al dashboard
description: Verifica que un usuario con credenciales válidas pueda iniciar sesión y aterrizar en la vista principal con accesos a módulos.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Procesar una factura pendiente e identificarla como impresa desde el centro de impresión (admin)
description: Verifica que un admin pueda seleccionar una factura pendiente, ver su ticket y marcarla como impresa desde la interfaz.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the print center module
Wait for the pending invoices queue to display at least one item
Click a pending invoice in the queue to load its ticket detail
Trigger printing from the print center workflow
Complete the in-app action to mark the invoice as printed
Verify the invoice is shown as printed in the print center interface (removed from pending queue or shown with printed status)

title: Cerrar sesión desde el dashboard
description: Verifica que un usuario con sesión activa pueda cerrar sesión y regresar a la pantalla de login.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Trigger the sign out action
Verify the user is redirected to the login view

title: Ver cola de pendientes e indicador de conexión en centro de impresión (admin)
description: Verifica que un admin pueda abrir el centro de impresión y ver el indicador de conexión junto con la cola de facturas pendientes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the print center module
Verify a connection/listening indicator is displayed and the pending invoices queue is visible (or an appropriate empty state is shown)

title: Modificar y eliminar ítems del carrito antes de confirmar
description: Verifica que al agregar múltiples productos a una factura se pueda modificar cantidades y eliminar ítems, quedando el carrito actualizado.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Cart Product A into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-CART-A into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Cart Product B into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-CART-B into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Open the manual stock adjustment tool for product A
Fill 10 into the stock adjustment quantity field
Fill Seed stock A into the adjustment reason field
Confirm the stock adjustment
Open the manual stock adjustment tool for product B
Fill 10 into the stock adjustment quantity field
Fill Seed stock B into the adjustment reason field
Confirm the stock adjustment
Click the link to open the invoicing module
Click the link to start creating a new invoice
Fill ZENT-SKU-CART-A into the SKU search field
Add the found product to the cart
Fill ZENT-SKU-CART-B into the SKU search field
Add the found product to the cart
Set the cart item quantity for product A to 3
Remove product B from the cart
Verify the cart shows only one item with the updated quantity

title: Filtrar facturas por número, estado y rango de fechas
description: Verifica que el usuario pueda aplicar filtros por número, estado y fechas y que la lista de facturas se actualice mostrando resultados consistentes con los criterios.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the invoice history module
Fill a known invoice number into the invoice number filter field
Select a status in the status filter
Select a valid date range in the date range filter
Verify the invoice list reflects the applied filters (only matching invoices are displayed or an appropriate empty state is shown)

title: Abrir una factura desde el historial y ver ticket de solo lectura
description: Verifica que el usuario pueda abrir una factura listada y visualizar el ticket con la información principal en modo solo lectura.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the invoice history module
Click an invoice from the list to open its detail
Verify a read-only ticket view is displayed with invoice header info, line items, and totals

title: Reflejar factura impresa en historial filtrando por estado impresa (admin)
description: Verifica que tras marcar una factura como impresa, el admin pueda encontrarla en el historial aplicando filtro por estado impresa.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the print center module
Wait for the pending invoices queue to display at least one item
Click a pending invoice in the queue to load its ticket detail
Complete the in-app action to mark the invoice as printed
Click the navigation option to open the invoice history module
Select the printed status in the status filter
Verify at least one invoice is displayed with printed status, including the one just marked as printed

title: Restricción por rol en historial: vendedor no ve facturas de otro vendedor al filtrar
description: Verifica que un vendedor no pueda obtener facturas de otros vendedores al aplicar filtros y que solo se muestren facturas permitidas por su rol.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the invoice history module
Apply filters intended to locate invoices from a different seller (when such a filter control exists)
Verify only invoices permitted for the current seller role are displayed and no cross-seller invoices are shown

title: Crear un producto desde inventario
description: Verifica que se pueda crear un producto desde el módulo de inventario y que aparezca en la lista de productos.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Test Product into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-001 into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Verify the newly created product appears in the products list

title: Editar un producto existente desde inventario
description: Verifica que se pueda editar un producto existente y que los cambios se reflejen en la tabla de inventario.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Edit Target into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-EDIT-001 into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Open the edit panel for the created product
Fill Zentory Edit Target Updated into the product name field
Save the product changes
Verify the product list reflects the updated product name

title: Registrar ajuste de stock manual con motivo
description: Verifica que un ajuste manual de stock con motivo se registre y aparezca como movimiento en el historial de movimientos de stock.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Stock Adjust Product into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-STOCK-001 into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Open the manual stock adjustment tool for the created product
Fill 5 into the stock adjustment quantity field
Fill Stock correction for UI test into the adjustment reason field
Confirm the stock adjustment
Verify a new stock movement entry is displayed for the adjustment

title: Persistencia de filtros al navegar entre lista y detalle
description: Verifica que al volver desde el detalle al listado, los filtros aplicados se mantengan y la lista siga en el mismo estado filtrado.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the invoice history module
Select a status in the status filter
Click an invoice from the filtered list to open its detail
Click the control to return to the invoice list
Verify the invoice list is still filtered by the previously selected status

title: Activar o desactivar un producto
description: Verifica que se pueda cambiar el estado activo/inactivo de un producto desde inventario y que el estado se actualice en la tabla.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Toggle Product into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-TOGGLE-001 into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Trigger the action to deactivate the created product
Confirm the deactivate action
Verify the product is shown as inactive in the products table

title: Limpiar filtros del historial y recuperar el listado general
description: Verifica que el usuario pueda limpiar los filtros aplicados y volver a ver el listado sin criterios activos.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the invoice history module
Select a status in the status filter
Fill a known invoice number into the invoice number filter field
Click the control to clear or reset all filters
Verify the invoice list is shown without the previously applied filter constraints

title: Bloquear confirmación de factura por stock insuficiente
description: Verifica que al intentar confirmar una factura con cantidad superior al stock disponible se muestre una validación de stock insuficiente y no se confirme.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Low Stock Product into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-LOW-001 into the SKU field
Fill a valid non-negative selling price into the price field
Save the new product
Open the manual stock adjustment tool for the created product
Fill 1 into the stock adjustment quantity field
Fill Seed minimal stock into the adjustment reason field
Confirm the stock adjustment
Click the link to open the invoicing module
Click the link to start creating a new invoice
Fill ZENT-SKU-LOW-001 into the SKU search field
Add the found product to the cart
Set the cart item quantity to 2
Attempt to confirm the invoice
Verify a stock validation error is visible and confirmation is blocked

title: Estado vacío en historial cuando no hay coincidencias
description: Verifica que al aplicar filtros que no devuelven resultados se muestre un estado vacío claro sin romper la página.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the invoice history module
Fill a non-existing invoice number into the invoice number filter field
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating there are no matching invoices

title: Validar precio negativo al crear producto
description: Verifica que el sistema bloquee la creación de un producto cuando el precio de venta es negativo mostrando un error de validación.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the inventory module
Open the create product panel from the administrative tools
Fill Zentory Negative Price Product into the product name field
Fill ZENT-SKU-NEG-001 into the SKU field
Fill -1 into the price field
Attempt to save the new product
Verify a price validation error is visible

title: Restringir acceso al centro de impresión para usuario sin rol admin
description: Verifica que un usuario sin rol admin no pueda acceder al centro de impresión y no pueda ver la cola de impresión.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /imprimir
Verify access is restricted and the print queue is not visible

title: Rechazar login con credenciales inválidas
description: Verifica que al ingresar credenciales inválidas el usuario no inicia sesión y se muestra un error de autenticación.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid_user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
